name: mcp-simple-pubmed

metadata.name: mcp-simple-pubmed
metadata.summary: An MCP server that provides access to PubMed articles through Entrez API.

modules.name: mcp_simple_pubmed
documentation: MCP server providing access to PubMed articles through Entrez API.

functions.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.main
documentation: Main entry point for the package.

modules.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.__main__
documentation: Main module entry point for mcp-simple-pubmed.

modules.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.server
documentation: MCP server implementation for PubMed integration.

functions.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.server.configure_pubmed_client
documentation: Configure PubMed client with environment settings.

functions.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.server.list_tools
documentation: List available tools for interacting with PubMed.

functions.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.server.call_tool
documentation: Handle tool calls for PubMed operations.

functions.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.server.main
documentation: Run the MCP server.

modules.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search
documentation: Search functionality for PubMed using Bio.Entrez.

classes.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search.PubMedSearch

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search.PubMedSearch.__init__
documentation:
Initialize PubMed search client with required credentials.

Args:
    email: Valid email address for API access
    tool: Unique identifier for the tool
    api_key: Optional API key for higher rate limits

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search.PubMedSearch.search_articles
documentation:
Search for articles matching the query.

Args:
    query: Search query string
    max_results: Maximum number of results to return

Returns:
    List of article metadata dictionaries

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search.PubMedSearch._get_xml_text
documentation: Helper method to safely get text from XML element.

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_search.PubMedSearch._generate_urls
documentation:
Generate URLs for human access.

Args:
    pmid: PubMed ID
    doi: Optional DOI
    pmc_id: Optional PMC ID
    
Returns:
    Dictionary with URLs
Client for searching PubMed articles using Bio.Entrez.

documentation: Client for interacting with PubMed/Entrez API.

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_client.PubMedClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize PubMed client with required credentials.

Args:

    tool: Unique identifier for the tool
    api_key: Optional API key for higher rate limits

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_client.PubMedClient._clean_text
documentation: Clean and format text content.

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_client.PubMedClient.search_articles
documentation:
Search for articles matching the query.

Args:
    query: Search query string
    max_results: Maximum number of results to return

Returns:
    List of article metadata dictionaries

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_client.PubMedClient.get_full_text
documentation:
Get full text and metadata of an article using metapub.

Args:
    pmid: PubMed ID of the article
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (article info dict, URLs dict)

methods.name: mcp_simple_pubmed.pubmed_client.PubMedClient._get_xml_text
documentation: Helper method to safely get text from XML element.
